blocks.text: Norway's classics squad rolls into Gent-Wevelgem
🚴 Gent-Wevelgem — 11:00 — Wærenskjold, Abrahamsen & Hoelgaard riding for Norway in the Spring Classics
♟️ Wed 16:00 — Carlsen opens FIDE Candidates — the World Championship challenger race begins
⚽ Sat 21:00 — Barcelona vs Atlético Madrid — La Liga title race, Barça lead by 4pts
